criteria.description: The share surface keeps only one visible challenge sentence while preserving a complete copy payload with the production link.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies the desktop share surface, the single visible challenge copy, and the preserved copy/share payload.

criteria.description: The Journey simulation exposes a floating autoplay toggle during active playback, and the control can pause and resume without resetting progress.
criteria.notes: The regression suite verifies that the floating autoplay control appears once the simulation starts and can flip from pause to resume state.

criteria.description: Empty SBTI watch clicks focus and shake the Hero gate instead of starting the Journey, while valid SBTI still starts the autoplay flow.
criteria.notes: Integration checks assert the shake marker, focus behavior, disabled Journey start state on empty input, and successful scroll/start after valid SBTI input.

criteria.description: The 008 polish set remains buildable and all three work packages are recorded in the done lane before acceptance.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build + kitty-specs/008-008-share-playback-sbti-feedback-polish/status.json
criteria.notes: The final validation run passed 29 tests across 4 files, the Vite production build completed successfully, and WP01 through WP03 are all materialized in the done lane.
